title: Create dreaming further
description: This modpack is made for me and my friends the mods it is focused on is create mekanism ad astra and origins a huge thank you to yang she helped me out a ton with the recipes like almost everything
body:
create dreaming further is a modpack to do the imposble its made so you can automate more and do more stuf in a balanced way some things are made harder to make it more chalanging but some are made easier to make it go faster
the focus of the modpack is
create
ad astra
mekanism

also a huge thank you to @yang for helping me to make the recipes she did most of the hard work.
